data.title: Royal Canin partners with athletes for AKC National Championship, celebrating dogs as MVPs. Featuring Michelle Wie West and Fernando Mendoza. Dec 12, 2025.
data.description: To celebrate the 25th anniversary of North America's biggest dog show, a pet health nutrition brand has teamed up with athletes to honor our canine companions as the real MVPs in our lives. The collaboration takes place in St. Louis on December 12, 2025. Royal Canin® U.S., a prominent name in pet health nutrition, is the driving force behind this initiative to showcase the importance of pets in our daily lives.

data.title: Balfour Beatty Communities collaborates with U.S. Army at Fort Leonard Wood, groundbreaking 69 new homes with $50M investment.
data.description: In Fort Leonard Wood, Missouri, a groundbreaking ceremony was held by Balfour Beatty Communities to commemorate the start of construction for 69 new homes in the Woodlands neighborhood. The event, attended by military families, U.S. Army leadership, and officials' representatives, signifies the launch of a project aimed at revitalizing housing and improving the living standards of service members and their families. With a significant $50 million investment allocated for this initiative, the construction of these new homes is a pivotal step towards modernization and enhancing the quality of life for military personnel.

data.title: Abbott raises quarterly dividend by 6.8%, marking 54th straight year of increase. Total payout up by over 70% since 2020, with 408th quarterly dividend paid since 1924.
data.description: Abbott, based in Abbott Park, Illinois, recently revealed a 6.8% increase in its quarterly dividend. This marks the 408th consecutive quarterly dividend for Abbott, a streak that dates back to 1924. The dividend payout has surged by over 70% since 2020, underlining the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders. Abbott's board of directors approved this dividend increment, reflecting the company's financial stability and growth trajectory. Trading under the ticker symbol ABT on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), Abbott continues to showcase resilience and sustained performance in the market.

data.title: Consolidated Theatres offers new loyalty program starting Dec 11, 2025. Free to join and premium membership available with free screenings for early 'Founding Members'.
data.description: Consolidated Theatres will introduce a Premium Membership on December 11, 2025, which includes a Free to Join option. For 'Founding Members' who sign up early, there will be FREE screenings offered. This marks the first-time-ever launch of the Premium Membership by the theater chain.
Terms set for Riksbank auctions of government bonds, significant changes in effect, numbers released.

data.title: Dow Jones, Russell 2000 at record highs due to Fed; Oracle, Broadcom affect techs. Fed rate cut key.
data.description: Last week, the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 indices reached all-time highs following a Federal Reserve interest rate reduction and supportive comments from Fed Chief Powell. However, the tech sector faced challenges with Broadcom and Oracle seeing declines. This weekly review highlights the positive performance of the Dow Jones and Russell 2000, driven by the Fed's actions, while also noting the struggles of tech giants Oracle and Broadcom.

data.title: Robinhood stock falls after releasing November metrics. Cathie Wood's ARK Invest buys $15.4M of shares.
data.description: Stock of Robinhood experienced a significant decline on Thursday following the release of its monthly metrics for November. ARK Invest, managed by Cathie Wood, purchased $15.4 million worth of shares amidst this drop. This move comes as Robinhood triggers a sell signal, prompting ARK Funds to capitalize on the opportunity.

data.title: Global UUV market projected to reach $8.72 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 8.0% from $5.93 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent reports indicate that the global UUV Market is anticipated to see significant growth, climbing from USD 5.93 billion in 2025 to USD 8.72 billion by 2030, reflecting a robust CAGR of 8.0%. This growth projection encompasses the anticipated increase in new deliveries within the market.

data.title: AI creation engines in biotech reduce drug discovery timelines by over 30%, propelled by wellness tech growth.
data.description: A recent press release from Aleen Inc. in Vancouver, BC on December 12, 2025 revealed that major pharmaceutical companies are leveraging AI models to reduce drug discovery timelines by at least 30%. These advanced models predict molecular behavior in advance, thereby saving researchers months of testing. This development marks a significant advancement in the pharmaceutical industry, streamlining the drug discovery process.

data.title: Beam launches Veo 3.1-powered AI platform creating playable video games & interactive stories. No code required. Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: A new platform powered by Veo 3.1, recently unveiled in San Francisco on December 12, 2025, is revolutionizing the creation process for content creators. This innovative tool, called Beam, enables users to transform videos into interactive mini-games and short films without the need for coding. With this technology, creators have the capability to enhance their content and engage audiences in new and exciting ways. This advancement is set to reshape the landscape of content creation, offering limitless possibilities. Be a part of this groundbreaking movement in the digital realm - bringing innovation directly to your fingertips.
